title: Fix Ibrahim verdict text overlapping debater nodes

log.context: Fix Ibrahim verdict text overlapping debater nodes

Done. Here's what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**CSS changes:**
- Added `overflow: hidden` to `.center-label` — this is the core fix, preventing any content from bleeding outside the 110×110px box regardless of what's inside
- Added `.center-label.done` state rules: hides `.mod-name` and `.mod-role`, shows `.mod-deliberating` in teal at a small font size
